title: Rhetinosperma longistipitatum
taxonomy: Rhetinosperma longistipitatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the order Malpighiales. The family Euphorbiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as spurge or euphorbia. Rhetinosperma longistipitatum is one of the many species within this family, each with unique characteristics. Its classification is based on its morphological and anatomical features, as well as its genetic relationships with other plants.
